title: Segmentation fault in loop schedule pipeline verifier
body:
**Test commit**
[417a5112947d9889cad54cb5b2110b37978b86b8](https://github.com/llvm/circt/commit/417a5112947d9889cad54cb5b2110b37978b86b8)

**Description**
The verifier for `loopschedule.pipeline` crashes with a null pointer dereference when a nested `loopschedule.pipeline.stage` operation lacks the mandatory start attribute.

**Steps to reproduce**
- Minimal MLIR program (test.mlir)
```
"builtin.module"() ({
  "func.func"() <{function_type = () -> (), sym_name = "missing_start_attr"}> ({
    %0 = "arith.constant"() <{value = 0 : index}> : () -> index
    %1 = "arith.constant"() <{value = false}> : () -> i1
    "loopschedule.pipeline"(%0) <{II = 1 : i64}> ({
    ^bb0(%arg0: index):
      "loopschedule.register"(%1) : (i1) -> ()
    }, {
    ^bb0(%arg1: index):
      "loopschedule.pipeline.stage"() ({
        "loopschedule.register"() : () -> ()
      }) : () -> ()
      "loopschedule.terminator"() : () -> ()
    }) : (index) -> ()
    "func.return"() : () -> ()
  }) : () -> ()
}) : () -> ()
```

**Command**
```
circt-opt test.mlir
```

**Output**
```
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/circt and include the crash backtrace.
```
